content: A senior manager of a private insurance firm has alleged that miscreants created fake insurance documents for a tractor involved in a Road accident case and submitted documents to police and the court for third-party claim.

Title: 3 Punjab residents killed, 1 injured as vehicle falls into gorge in Shimla
content: Three people from Punjab were killed while another was injured after the vehicle ferrying them rolled off road and fell into a 900 meter gorge in Shimla on Monday night.

Title: Poaching whiff in elephant deaths in Odisha
content: Elephants are killed by poachers for their tusks, which are often removed before the elephant dies. In some cases, the elephant's body is left in a decomposed state, indicating that the poachers did not care about leaving evidence behind.

Title: ‘Rash driving causes most accidents’
content: The police commissioner of Hubballi, Raman Gupta, said that most accidents are caused by rash driving and can be avoided with careful driving. He spoke after inaugurating a bike and car rally by the district administration rotary club Hubballi Parivar, 99 cannons motorcycle club, inner wheel club, and Hubballi Dharwad motor driving school association to mark National Road Safety Week. Gupta said that awareness on road rules is less among Indian drivers, and that social organizations should join hands with the police for the campaign. Byakod deputy commissioner of police, Crime and Traffic, said that it is mandatory to wear a helmet while riding a two-wheeler, and that seat belts must be worn while driving. Hasty travel leads to accidents.

Title: Jharkhand former CM Raghubar Das requests Tata Steel to construct flyover in JSR East
content: The former chief minister, Raghubar Das, has requested Tata Steel to construct 1.7-km long flyover from Baradwari to Agrico traffic signal on the Straight Mile Road.

Title: ‘Only 0.2% of accidents due to drunken driving in 2021’
content: The article discusses the number of accidents in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India. The article states that the number of accidents in Thiruvananthapuram decreased in 2021 compared to 2020. The article also states that drunken driving accounted for only 02 of the total number of Road accidents recorded in the city in 2021. The article also states that the number of accidents due to drunken driving made for 05 of the total number of Road accidents in the city in 2020. The article also states that drunken driving resulted in 10 accidents in which five people were grievously injured going by the report 1438 accidents occurred in the city in 2021. The article also states that under the classification of Road accidents by nature of traffic violations four occurred due to consumption of alcohol or drugs claiming one life three minor injuries were recorded in this category in 2021. The article also states that the low percentage of accidents due to drunken driving may not be mistaken for responsible and safe driving habits among the city residents. The article warns the officials that "a good number of accidents which occur in the evening and during the day before the weekend usually involve drivers who may be drunk". The article also states that police may also arrive at the scene late and may be too busy to take the people for alcohol test

Title: 74 of 185 accident victims in 2022 in Kolkata were pedestrians
content: In Kolkata, the Lalbazar released a statistics that showed that 40% of Road accident victims in the city were pedestrians last year. The city had witnessed 185 deaths in 178 accidents of which 74 victims were pedestrians in 2021. 196 people had died in 185 accidents and 77 of these victims were pedestrians following the NCRB data last year. Pedestrians were at fault in most of the accidents that involved jaywalking while other reasons included speeding, reckless driving, overtaking, and drinkdriving. The data also revealed that bikers had met with fatal accidents across the city for not abiding by traffic rules when they did not spot cops on the roads. "Though Kolkata has emerged as the best performer among other metro cities in terms of accident control, the total number of fatal accidents is still higher here than 26 other smaller cities these accidents mostly saw pedestrians’ deaths that is why all big projects of traffic police planned in 2023 like installation of boom barriers and ground led lights and development of model crossings and refuge islands in the middle of big crossings focus on the safety of pedestrians." said a senior officer of Kolkata police. Cops have finalized 26 points across the city where boom barriers will come up while another 26 spots have been chosen for installing led

Title: Two die in separate incidents
content: A college student and a man from Perambakkam were killed in separate accidents on Sunday night. Police said that the 43-year-old man from Perambakkam was on his way to his mother-in-law's house in Sivapuram when he lost control of his bike and hit the median on the road, dying on the spot. The 20-year-old student from Choolaimedu was also killed after running over a platform and smashing into the generator in front of a private bank. Police have registered a case against the driver of the bike.

Title: Eye on 2024 polls, Noida MLAs urge UP CM Yogi Adityanath to expedite projects
content: From 6% abadi plot issue of farmers to the need for more Kendriya Vidyalayas, government degree and inter colleges, and registry of flats for homebuyers — these were some of the matters raised by Noida, Dadri and Jewar MLAs in a meeting with UP chief minister Yogi Adityanath over the weekend.

Title: Two die in separate incidents in Tamil Nadu
content: Two people including a college student were killed in separate Road accidents at Perambakkam in Tiruvallur and Kodambakkam on Sunday night.

Title: 5 Fatehabad friends die in car-truck crash
content: Five friends on pilgrimage to Salasar from this city died in a Sunday night Road accident in Rajasthan's Sikar district, where they crashed their car head-on into a truck while overtaking another vehicle on the Fatehpur-Salasar highway.

Title: 51-year-old killed in accident in Bhopal; absconding driver booked
content: A 51-year-old man died after his scooter was hit by an unidentified vehicle, and his 14-year-old nephew was injured. The man's family filed a case against the driver of the vehicle, and police are investigating.

Title: Ola S1 rider suffers serious injuries as front suspension breaks after a high impact
content: In yet another incident of the front suspension breakage, a rider seems to have suffered severe injuries after falling from the scooter while it was in motion.

Title: Three siblings die after truck rams their scooter in Tamil Nadu
content: Three siblings, including two young women, were killed after a speeding truck rammed the scooter they were riding near Periyampatty in Dharmapuri district on Wednesday evening.

Title: Police step up heat on errant motorists
content: The traffic police have stepped up the heat on motorists and bikers flouting road rules, leading to snarls and accidents.

Title: Police step up heat on errant motorists
content: The traffic police in Nashik are stepping up the enforcement of traffic rules, with particular attention paid to violations such as wrong side driving, signal jumping, and speaking on a cellphone while driving. In 2021, the police issued over 12,000 citations for jumping red signals, and took action against 28,000 people for parking in no-parking areas. This year, the police have issued over 12,000 citations for driving in no-entry lanes, and are conducting special drives against speedsters. Additionally, the police are focusing on violations such as speaking on a cellphone while driving, which has resulted in a significant increase in citations in recent years.

Title: Motorists demand filling of potholes
content: Motorists in Vizag, Vizianagaram, and Srikakulam districts are demanding steps to fill potholes to curb Road accidents during road safety week. The motorists say that in the absence of repair and maintenance, it has become a nightmare for them to commute on roads. Officials from various departments, including the police and the revenue administration, have identified some accidentprone zones and will discuss the matter in upcoming meetings.

Title: Rajasthan CM Ashok Gehlot flags off 25 new vehicle interceptors
content: Chief minister Ashok Gehlot on Tuesday flagged off 25 advanced interceptors capable of identifying number plates with artificial intelligence (AI) technology.

Title: 'Mass suicide' in Pune was 'pre-planned murder'; 4 brothers detained
content: The Pune Rural police on Wednesday arrested four brothers on the charge of murder of seven members of a family, whose bodies were found in Bhima river at Pargaon near Daund in Pune district between January 18 and January 24.

Title: 24-year-old killed after car hits bike, drags him for 12km in Surat
content: A 24-year-old man was killed after he was knocked down by a car and dragged for around 12 km after getting stuck under the fourwheeler in Surat, Gujarat. The gory incident revived memories of the Delhi Road accident, wherein a young woman had similarly lost her life. The hit-and-run accident occurred on the night of January 18 on the Kadodara Bardoli road. When the victim later identified as Sagar Patil was riding the bike while his wife was in the back seat, a police officer said on Tuesday that a citizen recorded the video of the speeding car on his mobile phone which helped the police in identifying the vehicle. The driver of the car will be arrested soon.

Title: Man stabs wife to death on road in full public view
content: A 43-year-old man stabbed his wife to death in full public view on a road near Ambur town in Vellore district on Monday night. Police managed to identify and trace the accused with the help of CCTV footage in the vicinity. The accused was identified as S Jaishankar. He also runs an outlet selling construction materials. The deceased was identified as J Punitha. She was from a village near Ambur. Jaishankar, who was separated from his first wife, married Punitha 10 years ago. The couple had a daughter aged nine years and a son aged seven years. Jaishankar, who took to alcohol in recent years, used to suspect the fidelity of his wife and quarrel with her frequently over petty affairs. Unable to bear the harassment, Punitha left him and shifted to her mother’s house with the two children a few months ago. She joined a footwear manufacturing company in Ambur to support the family. Meanwhile, Jaishankar met with a Road accident and Punitha started visiting him at the hospital and helping him in the recovery process. The couple reconciled and started living together with their children. However, post-recovery, the mason again started harassing her.

Title: Vellore man stabs wife to death on road in full public view
content: A 43-year-old man stabbed his wife to death in full public view on a road near Ambur town in Vellore district on Monday night. Police managed to identify and trace the accused with the help of CCTV footage in the vicinity. The accused was identified as S Jaishankar, 43, a mason who also runs an outlet selling construction materials. The deceased was identified as J Punitha, 32, from a village near Ambur, Vellore district.

Title: Safer Cars: Ushering a new era of automotive safety in India
content: Despite the juggernaut of the COVID-19 pandemic, India has successfully broken free from its inextricable grasp and has overtaken Japan as the third-largest light vehicle market in the world in 2022. This momentum in the automotive segment is backed by a surge in strong demand for personal mobility and last-mile connectivity.

Title: Four devotees from Maharashtra killed in Road accident near Tirupati
content: Four devotees were killed on the spot while five others sustained injuries after their car rammed into a culvert in Chandragiri mandal near Tirupati on Wednesday.

Title: 2 killed, 5 injured in Road accident in Assam’s Dhubri district
content: Two girls were killed and five others injured in a Road accident in Assam’s Dhubri district, police said on Thursday.

content: As many as two persons were killed while two others suffered injuries after a speeding SUV ran over many pedestrians on the Bihta-Ara National Highway-30 in Patna.

Title: Process for ex gratia payout for Road accidents made easy in Goa
content: In a bid to provide financial relief to those families who applied but failed to get compensation due to delays or procedural lapses, the state government intends to offer ex gratia compensation of Rs 2 lakh to families of accident victims.

Title: ‘Mango flyover to start in 3 months after revised design’
content: The proposed flyover in mango will be revised in the next two months, prior to that traffic density assessment and decongestion plan. Soil testing of the flyover site will be done by an expert committee in next 15 days. State health and disaster management minister banna gupta who has been following the project for his home constituency jamshedpur west said that in about next three months the construction of the multicrore project would start. The minister made this announcement after chairing the joint meeting of the top officials of the state road construction department rcd central design organisation cdo tata steel utility and infrastructure services ltd tsuisl and the district administration here on monday. Earlier tata steel did not approve the initial design of the rs 462 crore project reportedly due to several shortcomings in the rcds design draft which necessitated a fresh design. The revised design will leave no room for any objections. The proposed flyovers origin point shall be near blue bells school in mango which is about 200m distance from rajasthan bhavan on dimma road which was the origin point in the initial design. The flyover will end on the slag road in bhuyadih. Further two separate flanks one each from the bada

Title: Bro: Man’s death in deaddiction centre is murder in Bengaluru
content: A 55-year-old hotelier died in a deaddiction center on Monday, and his younger brother has filed a police complaint accusing the wife, brother, and others of murder. Kumar's wife, brother, and others have been accused of killing Kumar to take over his properties worth millions of rupees. Kumar, a resident of Nagarabavi in Nagarabavi, was found dead inside the bathroom of a deaddiction center on the basis of a complaint from Kumar's younger brother. No arrests have been made yet.

Title: Cop hurt as vehicle hits culvert
content: An inspector from Siddipet lost control of his car and hit a culvert on Thursday, injuring him badly. He has since been hospitalized and is in a lot of pain.

content: The collision caused the pick-up vehicle to overturn and trap the passengers, he said adding the larger vehicle fled the spot, leaving behind the victims, most of whom fell unconscious.

Title: Haryana govt to prepare new lane driving SOP for highways
content: Haryana chief secretary, Sanjeev Kaushal on Friday directed the officers of the Transport Department to prepare a new state lane driving standard operating procedure (SOP) for implementing lane driving on highways.

Title: ‘Exemplary work’: 4 cops conferred awards on Republic Day
content: The four police officers who received awards are from the Gurgaon Police Department. Inspector Suman was awarded for her contribution towards solving cases of crime against women, while Subinspector Bhudev was awarded for strict compliance of traffic norms on the road and saving the life of a senior citizen. Assistant Subinspector Sandeep was awarded for his contribution in investigation of cybercrimes during his tenure at the cyber police station, and Head Constable Surender was awarded for saving a life of a woman stuck in her 11th floor apartment in a fire in October 2022. 17 manufacturers also received 23 awards in different categories in the garment sector, with Modelama Export Pvt Ltd. being the winner for the longest accident-free period. Maruti Suzuki India was the winner in the heavy engineering category, Honda Motorcycle & Scooters was the winner in three categories, and Best Creche Arrangement was the winner for Best Environment. Finally, First Aid Facility was the winner in the category of Best First Aid.

Title: Delhi court slams cops, says extra efforts needed in case of senior’s death
content: A Delhi court has deprecated the “casual, highly unprofessional and absolutely insensitive” approach of police officers in handling a case regarding the unnatural death of an 85-year-old retired Border Security Force official, Ujagar Singh. The court of presiding officer of Motor Accident Claims Tribunal Kamini Lau said that it expects the police chief to take appropriate steps “to send a strong message across the ranks”.

Title: 4 dead as car with marriage party on board falls from bridge in West Bengal's Kalimpong
content: Four people were killed and several others injured on Saturday after a speeding car with a marriage party on board fell from a bridge in West Bengal's Kalimpong district, police said.

Title: 3 killed in two Road accidents in Trichy
content: Two people were killed when their bike was hit by a car on a highway. The driver of the car was arrested.

content: Three people were killed in separate Road accidents in Trichy.

Title: 2 dead as car hits scooter, drags rider for 350 metre in Delhi; 5 held
content: Two scooter riders died after a car collided head-on with their vehicle in Delhi's Keshav Puram and drove on, dragging along for a distance one of its two riders, whose head got stuck between its mangled bonnet and the windshield.

Title: 22-yr-old biker killed in Road accident at Bhosari Phata
content: A motorcyclist was killed after a private bus hit his vehicle in an attempt to overtake it on the Punemumbai Highway in Bhosari Phata early Tuesday. The bus driver fled the scene after the accident. The officer from the Bhosari Police said the accident occurred around 430 am. Pawar was riding his motorcycle from Akurdi towards Bhosari. The private bus too was plying on the same route in an attempt to overtake the bus hit the motorcycle Pawar lost control of his vehicle and fell on the road. He had suffered serious injuries in the accident and following this he was taken to a nearby hospital where he succumbed to his injuries during treatment. The bus driver has been identified and the police are searching for him. There have been other Road accidents involving private buses in the recent past. Two pedestrians died after they were hit by a private bus at Mali Mala on the Punesolapur Road in Loni Kalbhor around 6am on January 24. The two women had deboarded a bus and were crossing the road when a private bus heading from Latur to Pune hit them. Mon September 22 2022 a privatelyoperated luxury bus knocked down a 60yearold woman pedestrian at Gunjan Chowk on Pune-

Title: Two kids die, 4 injured as speeding lorry rams car
content: A family of 10 was traveling to a wedding in a car when they were hit by a speeding lorry. The two children who died in the accident were 11-year-old Lingala Harish and 3-year-old Jaswitha. Four other people were injured, two of whom are in an ICU. The driver of the lorry has fled the scene and police are searching for him.

Title: Cops & auto drivers will be trained to help crash victims
content: The Ghaziabad health department has decided to train police personnel and auto and erickshaw drivers to give basic first aid to Road accident victims and rush them to hospital. A proposal to this effect has been sent to senior police officers for a review. Officials said during the training health department teams will inform them about symptoms of head injuries and the right way to pick up injured people among other things. Once the exercise gets under way in Ghaziabad, the chief medical officer will provide first aid kits at police outposts. "In many Road accident cases the victims are unable to reach the hospital on time if first aid is made available to them at the earliest it can save many lives," said Dr. R.K. Gupta, district surveillance officer. "We are planning to conduct training sessions for traffic constables and subinspectors as well as auto and erickshaw drivers who spend the majority of their time on the roads and often witness accidents if they are sensitised with the help of basic first aid knowledge they can help in saving lives and rush people to hospital in less time." According to the health officials, the training will focus on 16 black spots of the city where accidents often occur. "These places have already been identified by the police and our emergency

Title: Four killed in Road accident in Churu dist
content: A group of people were heading to a temple to pray after their wedding when their jeep collided with a truck. Four people died and four were injured.

Title: Sub-collector hurt in accident
content: A subcollector from a division in Vijayawada was in a car accident on Saturday morning. He and two others were injured, and were taken to Ongole Government Hospital. The accident happened when a lorry coming from Cheemakurthy and going towards Podili collided with the subcollector's car at Uppalapadu Village. His assistant Mehboob Basha and driver Jani Basha also sustained minor injuries in the accident. The subcollector's car was registered a case and an investigation is underway.

Title: Rise in number of accidents involving bicycles in district
content: The state capital of Thiruvananthapuram recorded 22 Road accidents involving bicycles in 2021. This number is significant because it is the first time that this has been reported in the city. The number of accidents in 2021 was lower than in 2020 and 2019, likely because of the Covid-19 lock-out. The report classifies accidents under various categories, and bicycle-related accidents are included under the category of accidents based on the type of impacting vehicle. Objects figures for 2021 show that all the 22 accidents involved grievous injuries to the people involved. Over the years, there has been a strong clamour to ensure safe cycling tracks on city roads, but due to lack of planning and space constraints, the demand has not been met yet. The minutes of one of the latest board meetings showed that smart city Thiruvananthapuram Limited and the city corporation were planning to revive the last mile connectivity scheme through public bicycle sharing in the city. The scheme is already functional in Kochi around 200 ebicycles are likely to be introduced in the city for the project. Public bicycle sharing was initially a part of the smart city proposal, but concerns were raised regarding the feasibility of the project. The main reason to put the project on hold was the difficulty in

Title: Teacher dies in Silchar accident
content: A 34-year-old schoolteacher was killed in a Road accident on the Silchar-Kalinganagar road in Topkhana on the outskirts of Silchar town on Saturday.

Title: Claim can be enhanced based on merits: Andhra Pradesh HC
content: Even without specific pleadings, the compensation payable under accident insurance to victims can be enhanced based on the merits of the case, said AP high court in a recent judgement.

Title: Govt to roll out vehicle scrap policy in CG soon
content: The Chhattisgarh government is introducing a new vehicle scrappage policy starting next financial year. The policy is aimed at encouraging the scrapping of vehicles that have attained a "critical age" of 15 years or more. The government will lead the way in scrapping around 900 government vehicles. This will have a major positive impact on the environment, as new vehicles will help curb Road accidents in the state. The purchase of new vehicles will also boom in the state, and the state's economy will grow as a result.

Title: Techie lands in Hyderabad from US, dies in crash on way home
content: A USA-returned software professional died in a Road accident while returning home in Guntur on Sunday. The incident occurred after the car in which he was travelling hit a railing.

Title: Constable dead, 3 others injured in Road accident in MP's Shajapur district
content: A police constable died, while three other persons including an inspector sustained injuries in a Road accident in Maksi police station in Shajapur district.

Title: In death, Ujjain trader gives new life to ex-jawan, 3 others
content: A 55-year-old naik serving in Defence Service Corps in Pune, suffering from heart disease, got a new lease of life on Monday as the heart of a brain-dead Ujjain businessman was flown in a special Army plane from Indore and transplanted upon him.

Title: Study by Goa Medical College doctors finds 12.7% Road accidents due to alcohol consumption
content: A study on road traffic accidents (RTAs) conducted by two doctors from the Goa Medical College and covering 440 cases found that a large number of drivers—13.04%—drove without a licence and that a sizeable number had consumed alcohol, thus placing themselves and others at risk.

Title: Four dead in Mumbai-Ahmedabad highway collision near Cyrus Mistry car crash spot
content: Four people were killed after a car collided with a luxury bus on the Mumbai-Ahmedabad highway in Dahanu area of Palghar district on Tuesday, police said. The car was en route to Mumbai from Gujarat when the driver lost control of the vehicle and rammed into the bus coming from the opposite side, as per Palghar police.

Title: Driver rams car into students in Kathua; 1 girl dead, 10 kids injured
content: A 17-year-old girl named Jammu was killed and 10 other students were injured after a speeding car rammed them while they were waiting for a bus outside their school in Kathua, India. The car was on its way to Jammu from Punjab when its driver lost control and hit the school children. Jammu died on the spot, and 10 other students suffered injuries. The injured students were immediately shifted to government medical college GMC Kathua for treatment. One student, Amit Lagotra, who suffered critical injuries was later referred to GMC Jammu from where his family members reportedly shifted him to Pathankot for special treatment. The police said the accused driver was arrested and the vehicle was seized. Deputy Commissioner Rahul Pandey and Dogra Swabhiman Sangathan Chairman Chaudhary Lal Singh visited GMC Kathua to inquire about the condition of the injured students. Jammu and Kashmir Lieutenant Governor Manoj Sinha also extended his condolences over the loss of life in the Kathua Road accident. His office tweeted "extremely pained by the tragic Road accident in Kathua, I share the pain of the bereaved family. I pray that young children injured in the accident recover at the earliest." Union Minister Dr. Jitendra Singh tweeted

Title: College student killed, 46 injured in Road accident in Ariyalur
content: A bus carrying 50 passengers overturned on a road near Rayampuram village in Sendurai district on Monday morning, injuring 46 people. The bus was travelling from Jayankondam in Ariyalur district to Thuraiyur in Trichy district. Local people rushed to the scene and rescued the passengers. One of the passengers, a 20-year-old college student, died from his injuries before he was admitted to the Ariyalur government hospital. The Sendurai police have registered a case and are investigating the accident.

Title: Padatha Painkili: Bharat and Avantika are critical after a Road accident; Deva prays for their recovery
content: 'Padatha Painkili' is one of the popular shows on Malayalam TV. The family drama has Maneesha Mahesh, Manu Martin, Sreelatha Namboothiri, Dinesh Panicker, and Sachin SG playing the lead characters.

Title: In death, Ujjain trader gives new life to Pune ex-jawan, 3 others
content: A 55-year-old naik serving in Defence Service Corps (DSC) in Pune, suffering from heart disease, got a new lease of life on Monday as the heart of a brain-dead Ujjain businessman, Pradeep Aswani, was flown in a special Army plane from Indore and transplanted upon him.

Title: Case registered day after 2 youths die in Road accident in Meerut
content: A day after two people including Gaurav Tyagi and Vansh Tyagi died on the spot when a jeep ran over them after hitting their scooty on Meerut-Parikshitgarh road, police registered a case against two accused on Tuesday night.

Title: Durg police get special transmitter jacket & hat
content: A special transmitter jacket and hat have been prepared for traffic police personnel deployed at different junctions in Chhattisgarh's Durg district to manage vehicular movement. The jacket and hat are equipped with receivers that light up and transmit signals in sync with traffic signals. The professor who developed the jacket and hat said that it is hoped that the equipment will help to reduce the number of Road accidents in the district. Durg superintendent of police, SP Abhishek Pallav, said that the jacket and hat will be used by traffic police personnel to manage traffic in the district.

Title: 2 youth killed as bike hits speeding truck in Durg
content: Two people were killed in a Road accident near Anda Poloce station in Durg on Tuesday night. The victims were returning from an event when their bike got dashed by a speeding truck at a blind turn in Itwari market road. The deceased have been identified as Keval Patel 23 and Parmanand Thakur 25. According to the police, he vehicles collided headon killing both of them on spot. The duo was drunk and was driving at speed. When they suddenly saw the truck coming toward them, their bike got uncontrollable and they got hit by the speeding truck. Besides the victims were not wearing helmets.

Title: Minor's death: Cops look for cues to implicate juvenile rider's uncle in Telangana
content: Hayathnagar police investigating the fatal Road accident involving a minor bike rider said the twowheeler belonged to the uncle of the accused’s minor friend and they took the vehicle out when he was not at home. Police said they have to gather more evidence to implicate the owner of the bike. After the death of 13-yearold class VIII student, M Sai Sreeshanth Reddy, police altered the section of the case from 337 (causing injuries due to rash or negligent act) of the IPC to 304-A (causing death due to rash or negligent act) of the IPC.

Title: 9% rise in 2022 Road accidents in Goa, 271 lives lost in 3,011 crashes
content: In a shocking revelation, it has been found that two-third of the people who died in Road accidents in 2022 were on two-wheelers.

Title: Man crossing road to board bus dies in Gurugram's IFFCO Chowk hit and run
content: A 34-year-old bus driver crossing the road on foot was mowed down by a heavy vehicle and dragged for a few metres near IFFCO Chowk early on Thursday.

Title: 50-year-old man’s organs give life to four others in Delhi
content: The organs of a 50-year-old deceased man have given a new lease of life to four people in the national capital. The donor was a furniture designer from Faridabad who passed away at AIIMS trauma centre after meeting a Road accident.

Title: Work on Chennai Port-Maduravoyal corridor to begin in June after Centre’s nod
content: Construction of the Chennai Port-Maduravoyal elevated corridor project, stalled for 11 years, is likely to commence in June after the Union environment ministry’s top advisory body gave its approval last week.​

Title: Lane driving must for heavy vehicles on 3 key highways in Gurugram
content: After the Delhi-Gurgaon expressway, police have decided to enforce lane discipline for buses and goods carriers on MG Road, the KMP Expressway and the Sohna highway as well. Violators will be fined, officials have said.

Title: Kerala Budget: Focus on medical tourism hailed
content: With India pitching itself as a medical tourism destination at the G20 meeting recently, Kerala is aiming to ensure that it is not left behind. The budget presented on Friday focuses on activities that transform the state into a health hub by providing better healthcare and health tourism services by expanding and modernizing existing facilities. An amount of Rs 30 crore has been earmarked in the budget towards this.

Title: Not giving FIR copy, post mortem report abuse of law: Calcutta HC
content: Denying a person copies of FIR and post-mortem reports was "abuse of the process of law", the Calcutta High Court ruled on Thursday and asked the Kolkata Police commissioner and South 24 Parganas police superintendent to investigate officers who made a person run around for several years for these documents after losing his 18-year-old son and mother in a 2015 Road accident that also left his wife critically injured.

Title: Rohini killings: Clues lead nowhere in murder of 3
content: September 21, 2012. Residents of Pocket B-7, Sector 17, Rohini, an otherwise quiet and peaceful locality, woke up to the shock and horror of a family having been wiped out in their neighbourhood. Yogendra Pratap Singh Chauhan, a 53-yearold chemicals businessman, was found murdered in the bedroom on the ground floor of his two-storey residence.

Title: Speeding truck mows down 3 women in Andhra Pradesh
content: Three women died while one other suffered severe injuries after a lorry hit them near Mandhada village on Amudalavalasa-Palakonda road in Srikakulam district of Andhra Pradesh on Saturday.

Title: Pedestrians make up 26% of road deaths in Nashik city in last 2 years
content: Around 26% of people killed in Road accidents over the past two years in Nashik were pedestrians, revealed the data provided by the city traffic police.

Title: Why farmers in these villages are staying up all night
content: In the dead of the night, out in the cold, 60-year-old Gyanendra is perched on a machaan at the edge of his field. He sits there quietly, on the rickety structure, hastily put together some 2-3 metres from the ground with some hay for a seat, tarpaulin sheet for a roof.

Title: Nepal-bound bus collides with truck in Bareilly; 17 injured, 5 critical
content: As many as 17 people suffered injuries after a speeding roadways bus carrying 32 passengers from Mathura to Nepal collided with a truck coming from the opposite direction in Khuthar area of Bareilly on Saturday morning.

Title: Bhopal man gets 6 months jail for reckless driving
content: A local court sentenced a person to six months of rigorous imprisonment and imposed a penalty of Rs 2,000 for injuring a woman in a Road accident by reckless driving of his car. According to the prosecution, the complainant lodged an FIR at the police station on November 23, 2012. The incident took place near 10 Number Market in Bhopal.

Title: 'Launda naach' was his life, but then he lost his legs
content: Thirty-five-year-old Santosh Sah is a cross-dresser dancer who was run over by a speeding truck after performing at a wedding in December last year. In the process, he not only lost his legs but also came close to losing his identity

Title: 'How I convinced my widowed mom to marry again'
content: His mother was just 40 when Yuvraj Shele lost his father. So, he was not going to let society condemn her to a life of indignities and isolation. But he knew he would have to fight a village

Title: Much delayed elevated highway project may be completed by July in July
content: After missing several deadlines, the elevated highway project, which is expected to ease much of Ludhiana’s traffic issues, may be completed by this July.

Title: Cycle rider hit by goods auto in Mandya, dies
content: A cycle rider died in a Road accident near Banduru village of Malavalli taluk on Monday afternoon.

Title: Four persons killed in two separate Road accidents in Andhra Pradesh
content: Four people were killed in two separate Road accidents in north AP.

Title: 47 minors’ parents booked as Ghaziabad cops step up heat on underage driving
content: Stepping up the crackdown on underage driving by holding parents accountable, police on Monday formed 20 teams that will be posted near schools, busy roads and places like the Hindon elevated road, from which stunts have been frequently reported, to catch minors driving cars and two-wheelers.On Monday, police seized vehicles and booked the parents of 25 minors under Section 336 (endan

Title: Bokaro boy makes Rakshak app to help accident victims
content: A Class 10 student of Delhi Public School (DPS), Bokaro, Rupesh Kumar, has developed a special device and mobile application, 'Rakshak', to provide medical facilities to Road accident victims within the shortest possible period of time. For this innovation, Rupesh has been selected for the 'Inspire Award Standard Scheme' by the Union government. The Centre has given him an incentive of Rs 10,000 to further the project, said DPS sources.

Title: Widened Dabha ring road witnesses 42 deaths in 4 years
content: People living along the Dabha ring road from New Katol Square to Amravati Road, who were happy after the state’s public works department widened and concretized the stretch, are now concerned about Road accidents and speeding vehic

Title: Two die in Road accident in Bhopal's Kolar
content: A speeding tractor rammed into an auto-rickshaw that was carrying four men including the auto-driver at Suraiya Nagar village in Kolar on Mandideep border on Monday night.

Title: Don’t abandon your old cars, bikes; inform your RTO and scrap them
content: You can find scores of rusted and worn-out vehicles lying abandoned in different pockets of the city.

Title: Keep first-aid kits in your vehicles: Punjab to doctors, paramedics, teachers
content: Doctors, paramedical staff and teachers in Punjab, a state with a high road fatality rate, will now have to keep first-aid kits in their personal vehicles to provide on-the-spot care to accident victims before they are shifted to the nearest health facility.

Title: Auto-rickshaw, tractor collide in Kolar; two killed
content: A speeding tractor rammed into an auto-rickshaw carrying four men at Suraiya Nagar village in Kolar, close to Mandideep border, on Monday night. Two men died in the accident while there was no information about the three others.

Title: Why usual suspects need to be focus of attention for planners
content: In 2019, 2020, and 2021, GT Karnal Road, Wazirabad Road and Outer Ring Road cumulatively logged seven deaths per kilometre in traffic accidents. There were 314 deaths on Outer Ring Road, 145 on GT Karnal Road and 123 on Rohtak Road in the three years. These three segments are among the city’s top 10 high-risk corridors for all road users.

Title: Friday night fright: When roads are most unsafe in Delhi
content: The maximum number of fatal Road accidents in Delhi occur between 10pm and midnight on Friday, with two wheelers and pedestrians most at risk. This has been established by an analysis of accidents in the city carried out by Delhi government’s transport department. Speeding and drunken driving were two major contributing factors to the accidents.

Title: 5-day disaster management workshop at GBU
content: The Gautam Buddha University (GBU) is hosting a 5-day disaster management workshop. The workshop is being conducted by the National Institute of Disaster Management (NIDM), Ministry of Home Affairs, through India Universities and Institution Network (IUIN-NIDM).

Title: 5-day disaster management workshop at Gautam Buddha University
content: Gautam Buddha University (GBU) has organised a 5-day disaster management workshop on how to handle natural disasters like floods, fires, earthquakes as well as man-made ones including Road accidents and chemical hazards.

Title: National highways report most deaths per km in Delhi
content: Though there are just 438km of national highways spanning the capital, the number of deaths per kilometre has been high in the last three years. In 2021, there was at least one fatal accident every two kilometres on the national highways. Experts surmise that this could be because people usually drive at speeds up to 100kmph on highways.

Title: Why weekends are the most dangerous on Delhi roads
content: If it’s a weekend, be extra careful when on a road. Delhi’s roads witness the most number of a fatal accidents between 10pm and midnight on Fridays

Title: 2 dead in head-on collision of bikes at Mahuadabra road
content: Two persons were killed and one was injured in a head-on collision of two bikes on Wednesday morning at Mahuadabra road of Jaspur town in Udham Singh Nagar district.

Title: As fog lifts, MC wakes up to stray cattle menace
content: As foggy season is almost over, civic officials finally woke up to the threat of stray cattle posing a threat to commuters as on Wednesday, MC Commissioner Shena Aggarwal and MLA west Gurpreet Bassi Gogi launched a drive to lift stray bovines from city roads.

Title: Hours after report against Maharashtra refinery, journo ‘killed’
content: Hours after his article against the proposed Nanar refinery in Ratnagiri was published, Marathi journalist Shashikant Warishe met with a serious Road accident on Monday. An office-bearer of a group backing the refinery was arrested.

Title: Khap warning over stray cattle in Haryana
content: The Majra khap panchayat of Haryana’s Jind district served an ultimatum of a week to the district administration to look into the menace of stray cattle that damage the standing crops by entering in the fields in several villages in the district.

Title: Remarried widow entitled to half of jawan's post-death benefits: Court
content: A local civil court ordered that the post-death benefits of a Central Industrial Security Force (CISF) jawan be shared equally between his mother and widow, who remarried a few years after the jawan's death.

Title: Two killed in Road accident in Lucknow
content: Two youths were killed while their friend suffered critical injuries in a road mishap which took place in Sairpur police station area in Lucknow on Wednesday night.

Title: Five killed in two Road accidents in Andhra Pradesh
content: Five people — including three youngsters — were killed in two separate Road accidents that took place during the intervening night of Thursday and Friday, in Vizag city and Anakapalle district in Andhra Pradesh.

Title: One killed, five injured in Road accident in Aligarh
content: In a tragic accident, a 20-year-old student was killed, while five other students of the ACM College sustained severe injuries after a speeding car ran over them under the Jawan police station area of Aligarh.

Title: Pedestrians have right of way, enforce it: Kerala HC
content: Pedestrian crossings should be marked on all main roads and they should be enforced too, the high court has directed.

Title: Road accident leads to clash; 2 cases registered in Mangaluru
content: Two cases were registered at the Surathkal police station on Wednesday, after an accident took place between a two-wheeler and a car, that led to a scuffle between two groups near Ganeshpura Circle.

Title: Catering staffer dies after DJ’s aides hit him with crate for refusing plates in Delhi
content: A catering supervisor died after he was assaulted by a group of men at a wedding function in Rohini on Wednesday.

Title: Student from Hyderabad in coma after car crash in US
content: A student from Hyderabad, Shree Likitha Pinnam, who is pursuing higher studies at Wichita State University (WSU) in Kansas, United States, suffered a head injury in a Road accident. She is battling for her life.

Title: Ensure safety of students at Opa junction, says child rights panel in Goa
content: After several casualties were reported, and with children forced to board public transport standing on the road at Opa road junction bus stop, the Goa state commission for protection of child rights has recommended urgent action from the Ponda deputy collector’s office.

Title: Tamil Nadu not No.1 in organ donation
content: The number of donations from brain-dead patients in Tamil Nadu more than doubled to 156 in 2022 over 2021, when 60 such donations were registered.

Title: Man, wife & daughter killed as truck rams into auto on Ara-Patna road
content: A 38-year-old man, his wife and their daughter died, while their three children sustained injuries in a Road accident on the Ara-Patna road on Friday afternoon. The incident occurred when a speeding truck coming from the opposite direction rammed into the auto rickshaw they were travelling in near the under construction Kulhariya Toll Plaza under Koilwar police station of the Bhojpur district.

Title: 4 die, 2 injured in Gopalganj Road accident in Bihar
content: Four persons died on the spot while two others sustained injuries in a Road accident under Shripur Thana outpost in Gopalganj district on Thursday night.

Title: Jal Nigam contractor killed in Road accident on Bareilly-Haridwar highway
content: A 35-year-old Jal Nigam contractor died after a speeding vehicle hit his bike from the rear side near Lalaurikhera police outpost on Bareilly-Haridwar NH-74 under the jurisdiction of Jahanabad police station.

Title: Six die in two TN Road accidents
content: The deceased include four of a family from Tiruvarur district.

Title: Four persons killed in two Road accidents in Rajasthan's Dholpur, Churu
content: Four persons, including two siblings in Dholpur, were killed in two separate Road accidents in the state on Saturday evening. While a young boy and his sister, going for a wedding function at Dholpur's Sahajpur village, on a bike were hit fatally by a rashly-driven truck, two youths were killed when their scooter was hit by an SUV near Tara Nagar in Churu district.

Title: Four injured in accident near Marina beach in Chennai
content: Tamil Nadu minister for health and family welfare Ma Subramanian came to the rescue of four people who met with a Road accident near Marina beach late Saturday night. The minister took them to the hospital in his own vehicle.

Title: Youth's death gives new lease of life to 5 in Ahmedabad
content: It was a heart-wrenching news for Nehal Sharma when she was informed that her husband Mrugesh is termed brain-dead.

Title: J&K: Deputy Commissioner of Doda hands over 'route permits' to unemployed to earn livelihood
content: Deputy Commissioner of Doda issued three contract carriage permits to unemployed youth in Jammu. The permits will allow the drivers to ply the all Jammu and Kashmir routes. The drivers are urged to follow safety protocols. Read the detailed article below for more details and information about the route permit.

Title: Three Begusarai friends die in Katihar accident
content: Three friends died in a Road accident on National Highway-31 in Katihar district in the wee hours of Sunday. They belonged to Begusarai and were on way to Darjeeling when a truck hit their SUV

Title: 17-year-old girl died in accident, family donates her kidneys, liver in Nagpur
content: Family members of a 17-year-old girl student in the city, who died in a Road accident, decided to donate her kidneys and liver to needy patients. Zonal Transplant Coordination Centre (ZTCC) Nagpur informed that the organs gave three young patients a new lease of life. As per the wish of the family of the donor, authorities have not revealed their identity.

Title: Dilapidated road conditions on NHs 87, 74 in US Nagar demand immediate action
content: The residents of Rudrapur in Udham Singh Nagar have raised serious concerns over the deteriorating condition of two national highways (NH) 87 and 74 running through the district.

Title: ‘Trichy among top 5 districs in Road accidents’
content: Expressing concern over Road accidents being reported, Trichy collector M Pradeep Kumar on Monday said the district with 634 Road accident cases reported in 2022 is among the top five districts with high number of Road accidents. He was addressing school students at the children’s traffic park near the collectorate as a part of an awareness camp on road safety.

Title: Gopal Das took 19 leaves in 2022: CB
content: Sacked assistant sub-inspector (ASI) Gopal Das, accused of killing minister Naba Kishore Das on January 29, was granted 19 leaves in 2022, contrary to allegations by his family members that he was denied any leave since past several months, worsening his underlying mental illness.

Title: Amandeep Singh pierces through challenges to make a mark in para sport in Ludhiana
content: From losing both his legs in a Road accident at the age of 3, to losing his mother soon after winning his first gold medal at the state level, Amandeep Singh has seen it all. But nothing could stop him or impact his never-say-die attitude.

Title: Traffic snarls become everyday affair at Visakhapatnam's Hanumantha junction
content: For anyone commuting on the Anandapuram-Maddilapalem stretch in Vizag city at any time of the day, the name Hanumanthuwaka Junction is synonymous with nightmare of traffic jams.

Title: Two kids die, six people hurt in three separate accidents in Delhi
content: In three separate Road accidents in Delhi, two children died and six people were injured.

Title: Watch & be warned: Wrecks along NH send message on speeding evils
content: In a novel initiative to control accidents on the highways by warning drivers with more realistic visuals, Dungarpur police have placed mangled vehicles along with signboards and slogans on the side of a stretch of the NH-48 passing through the district.

Title: Actress June Maliah meets with a car accident; says, ‘By the grace of God, I am fine’
content: Actress and MLA June Maliah’s car met with an accident on her way to Midnapore. But she and her co-passengers escaped unharmed.

Title: 22-year-old specially-abled YouTuber Amit Mondal dies in tragic Road accident
content: On Tuesday, specially-abled YouTuber Amit Mondal suffered serious injuries after a tragic Road accident in West Bengal’s Frasergunj. He was shifted to Kolkata's SSKM hospital but breathed his last on Wednesday morning.

Title: Bokaro administration raps BSL for violating road safety norms
content: The district administration has talked tough against the Bokaro Steel Plant (BSL) for not implementing road safety norms properly in its township.

Title: Pillion riders in Chennai wearing helmets get certificates of appreciation, roses
content: With 58 pillion riders having died in Road accidents involving two-wheelers since January 2022, the Greater Chennai Traffic Police (GCTP) have increased the vigil thereby booking 57,826 cases against pillion riders in the city for helmetless driving.

Title: In Ambala, farmers protest by taking stray cattle to DC office
content: Farmers under the banner of Bharatiya Kisan Union (Shaheed Bhagat Singh) brought tractor-trolleys loaded with 400 heads of stray cattle to the office of Ambala deputy commissioner (DC) on Tuesday, to protest against the problem of stray cattle.

Title: Bihar govt hires shooters to kill nilgais, boars to save crops
content: The Bihar government has hired 13 professional shooters to kill wild boars and 'ghodparas' or nilgais to save crops, a forest official said on Tuesday.

Title: Black Wednesday: Four lose lives, 13 injured in five separate accidents
content: Four persons were killed in three separate Road accidents between Tuesday night and Wednesday evening, in less than 24 hours. Two more accidents occurred late Wednesday evening, bringing the total number of injured to 13.

Title: Former sarpanch’s hit-and-run in Jalna turns out to be murder in Maharashtra
content: Forty days after a former sarpanch died in a Road accident case, the Partur police of Jalna district, around 125km from here, have arrested his first cousin on the charge of his murder.

Title: QR code scans to give info on Bokaro police patrolling
content: QR code based e-beat patrolling system has been started in Bokaro. Under the new system, the patrolling team of Bokaro police will register their presence by scanning the QR code at many sensitive places, including the hotspots of the police station area. These QR codes are currently being installed at major Road accident black spots, so that patrolling teams at those places can be monitored.

Title: Four people killed, six injured in Road accident in Uttar Pradesh's Banda
content: Four people were killed in a accident on Paprenda road in Tindwari police area of Uttar Pradesh's Banda district.

Title: Karnataka: Accident deaths turn out to be murders in police probe
content: Police solved a triple murder case while investigating what looked like deaths in a Road accident in Anagodu village on National Highway 48 on February 11

Title: Watch: This last video of YouTuber Amit Mondal before his tragic death will leave you teary-eyed
content: The last video of specially-abled social media influencer Amit Mondal which he shot during his recent visit to Kolkata's Alipore Jail Museum has gone viral. The 22-year-old YouTuber died in a tragic Road accident on Wednesday morning.

Title: Container truck driver rams multiple vehicles; 1 killed in Nashik
content: A speeding container truck knocked down multiple vehicles in the Yeola area of Nashik rural on the Yeola-Manmad Road around 7 pm on Tuesday, killing one man on the spot and leaving five others injured. The Yeola police arrested the driver and produced him before the court on Wednesday.

Title: Singer Kumar Bishwajit’s son severely injured in Canada car crush, 3 of his friends dead
content: Popular Bangladeshi singer Bishwajit Dey’s son Nibir Kumar is in critical condition after suffering severe injuring in car accident in Canada.

Title: Speeding truck mows down 3 minors in Bareilly, two dead
content: Three class 10 students who were on their home on a bike, after giving class 10 exam, were mowed down by a speeding truck in the Shergarh area of Bareilly on Thursday. After the accident, locals thrashed the truck driver and handed him over to the police.

Title: Five baratis dead, 6 injured in Road accident in UP's Banda district
content: Five persons died and six others suffered serious injuries when a Bolero rammed a Scorpio in Banda district on Thursday morning. Both the vehicles were carrying baratis, who were returning from a wedding in neighbouring Chitrakoot district.

Title: 3, including woman, lover held for killing husband in Dehradun
content: Dehradun police arrested three, including a 30-year-old married woman and her lover, for allegedly killing her husband and making the incident look like a Road accident by throwing his body in a 50-metre-deep gorge along with his bike in the city's Vikasnagar area.

Title: Patna traffic police use social media to keep city moving
content: The Patna traffic police have started posting real-time alerts on its social media pages to give information to the commuters about the congested routes that they need to avoid to reach their destination. The initiative has been taken on the direction of ADG of Police (Headquarters), Jitendra Singh Gangwar.

Title: Not following rules leading to rise in accidents, says Superintendent of Police
content: A day after four lives were claimed in five Road accidents across the state, superintendent of police (traffic) Bossuet Silva on Thursday said the main reason for the increase in the accidents is the public not following traffic rules.

Title: 25% hit-&-run cases logged in Karnataka remain unsolved
content: One in four hit-and-run accident cases reported from across the state in the past four years remains unsolved, according to home department data. Between 2019 and 2023 (January), Karnataka witnessed 4,549 hit-and-run cases, of which 1,187 were not solved.

Title: 36km in 30 minutes: Drone for medicines delivery in Uttarakhand hills
content: In a first of its kind exercise, 2kg of anti-tuberculosis drugs were successfully delivered by a drone at a hospital in Uttarakhand’s Tehri Garhwal district from AIIMS Rishikesh, located 40km away.

Title: Goa: Drunk driving spikes accident cases reaching GMC post 9pm
content: Of the 260-odd cases reported daily at the casualty department of the state’s biggest hospital, GMC, during a day, around 80 to 100 are accidents related — road and industrial — as also those from bordering districts of Karnataka and Maharashtra.

Title: Two workers die in Road accident in Krishna
content: A Bolero car with labourers overturned on the national highway at Veleru in Bapulapadu mandal of Krishna district.

Title: Actress Geetha Singh's brother's son passes away in a Road accident
content: This is a tragic and heartbreaking situation. Tollywood actress Geetha Singh's brother’s elder son has passed away in a Road accident. On Friday, he was travelling in a car with four of his friends when the accident took place. The news of an untimely and tragic demise was shared by her co-actor Karate Kalyani.

Title: Alarm bells ring as road fatalities rise 7.6% in 2022 in Odisha
content: A day after a senior official of the Supreme Court Committee On Road Safety (SCCORS) asked the Odisha government to curb Road accidents in the state, data released by the state police on Friday showed a 7.6% rise in fatalities in 2022 across the state as compared to 2021.

Title: Minor among three dead, 19 injured in two separate incidents in J&K's Reasi, LG Manoj Sinha expresses grief
content: "Two person were killed and 19 others got injured when a passenger vehicle (Canter- JK11A-0215) carrying pilgrims to Cave Shrine of Shiv Khori skidded off the road and plunged into a gorge in Reasi district of Jammu region of Union Territory (UT)," officials said.

Title: Speeding on highways? AI cams in Gurgaon & Faridabad soon to track violators
content: All the state and national highways passing through Gurgaon and Faridabad will soon come under electronic surveillance as part of an ambitious project by the government to rein in speedsters and curb accidents.

Title: Shahjahanpur administration asks village heads to shelter 10 cows each to rein in their menace
content: ​​​​The administration has made the call under the "Every pradhan, 10 cattle" campaign started by it to bring to safety stray cattle and prevent them from blocking roads and getting into fields.

Title: 15 vehicles collide on Delhi-Meerut Expressway in Ghaziabad due to fog
content: Over 15 vehicles collided on the Delhi-Meerut Expressway in Masuri area of Ghaziabad due to dense fog and poor visibility in the wee hours of Sunday.

Title: Compassionate job is not a source of recruitment, says Madras HC
content: Observing that compassionate appointment is not a source of recruitment, the Madras high court has dismissed a plea by a man seeking appointment to the post of junior assistant though he was provided employment as fireman.

Title: TNSTC bus driver, conductor die in Road accident near Tirupur
content: The deceased have been identified as driver Paulkannan,45, of Thekkampatti in Theni district, and conductor J Murugan, 51, of Ammapatti in Theni.

Title: Former Tripura CM Biplab Deb escapes unhurt in car crash in Haryana's Panipat
content: Former Tripura chief minister and BJP leader Biplab Kumar Deb on Monday escaped unhurt after his car rammed into a stationary vehicle on the GT road in Haryana's Panipat district, police said.

Title: Cattle menace: Village heads asked to shelter 10 cows each
content: The district administration here has asked village heads take care of 10 stray cows each to prevent them from damaging farmers' crops.

Title: ‘Bus conductor not a skilled worker’: Karnataka HC cuts accident-death relief
content: A bus conductor isn’t a skilled professional that one can argue about his prospects for gainful employment even after retirement, the Kalaburagi bench of the Karnataka high court said while reducing the compensation given to the family of a Maharashtra State Road Transport Corporation employee who died in a Road accident.

Title: Man crushed by tractor-trolley in UP's Muzaffarnagar, angry relatives block road
content: A 23-year-old man was killed in a Road accident near Kailash Nagar village under the Ratanpuri police station area of Uttar Pradesh's Muzaffarnagar district.

Title: 2-year-old girl among 2 killed in separate Road accidents in Nashik
content: A two-year-old girl and a 19-year-old youth were killed in two separate accidents in Nashik on Friday and Saturday.

Title: Cattle menace in Uttar Pradesh: Village heads asked to shelter 10 cows each
content: The district administration here has asked village heads take care of 10 stray cows each to prevent them from damaging farmers' crops.

Title: Accident case: Karnataka HC cuts relief for dead bus conductor's kin
content: A bus conductor does not belong to the category of professionals who have chances of re-employment after retirement, the Kalaburagi bench of the Karnataka high court has observed, while slightly reducing the compensation awarded to the family members of a deceased conductor in a motor vehicle accident case.

Title: Pick-ups, light trucks among biggest traffic rule violators in Delhi
content: Pick-ups and light trucks were among the vehicles that most violated the speed limits in the city. Minibuses too were guilty of this infraction, according to a study of Road accidents carried out by the transport department.

Title: Fatal distraction: North Delhi fares worst
content: North district is the most dangerous of Delhi's districts as far as Road accidents go. An analysis of road incidents in 2019, 2020 and 2021 tracked the death rate as a ratio per population of each district.

Title: Mohali to get roundabouts at all major road crossings
content: Punjab minister for housing and urban development Aman Arora has issued orders to the Greater Mohali Area Development Authority (GMADA) to construct roundabouts at major road crossings of the city.

Title: Man, son die in Road accident near Trichy
content: The deceased have been identified as S Mani, 32, of Karattampatti near Musiri and his son M Vishnu.

Title: 2 killed as truck hits car on Bengaluru-Mysuru Expressway
content: Two persons have died, and another three persons seriously injured in a Road accident on Bengaluru-Mysuru Expressway at Gejjalagere in Maddur taluk in the wee hours of Monday.

Title: Zirakpur, Derabassi among areas most prone to fatal accidents: Report
content: According to the accidents analysis report of the road safety committee, Punjab Zirakpur, Derabassi, Lalru and Sohana are most prone to fatal accidents.

Title: Model code forces Telangana CM K Chandrasekhar Rao to postpone Visakhapatnam rally
content: With the model code of conduct in force in Andhra Pradesh owing to MLC polls and byelections in Maharashtra and Tamil Nadu, BRS president K Chandrasekhar Rao has postponed his next month's public meeting in Visakhapatnam and tours in Tamil Nadu, Maharashtra and Odisha.

Title: 5 of a family killed in lorry-autorickshaw collision in Andhra Pradesh's Parvathipuram
content: Five members of a family, including four women, died while six others suffered injuries when the autorickshaw they were travelling in was hit by a speeding lorry on the inter-state highway in Komarada in Parvathipuram district on Wednesday. The lorry driver fled from the spot after the accident.

Title: Drunken driving, indiscipline behind spike in accidents: Goa CM Pramod Sawant
content: The vehicle population has increased compared to the state population, Goa CM Pramod Sawant pointed out.

Title: Goa: Plain-clothes cops deployed to nab violators of M V Act
content: Whenever people see a policeman in uniform, they either try to overspeed or they take another route to escape being caught, saiddeputy superintendent of police (DySP) Jivba Dalvi.

Title: Pre-monsoon drain cleaning work begins in Patna
content: As part of its pre-monsoon cleaning process, the Patna Municipal Corporation (PMC) started clearing and de-silting the city's drains, manholes, and catch pits from February 15. The move is taken early to avoid waterlogging issues in city during the monsoon.

Title: Pune-Bengaluru highway becomes death trap for wild animals
content: The Pune-Bengaluru national highway passing through Doddasiddavvanhalli in rural Chitradurga has turned into a death trap for wild animals.

Title: 6 killed, 12 students injured in three separate Road accidents in Uttar Pradesh's Hathras
content: Accidents in various parts of Uttar Pradesh's Hathras district claimed the lives of as many as six people and left several others, including 12 school students, injured, said police on Wednesday.

Title: Five die in Road accident near Krishnagiri in Tamil Nadu
content: When the tractor crossed the Salem-Bengaluru National Highway near Errahalli village, an omnibus heading to Salem from Bengaluru rammed the tractor trailer.

Title: Clamour against vigilantes reaches legislative assembly
content: The clamour against cow vigilantes reached the Haryana legislative assembly on Wednesday. On the second day of the assembly’s ongoing budget session, two MLAs of the Congress, Mamman Khan and Mohammad Iliyas, said more incidents, like the one in which two men from Rajasthan were killed in Bhiwani recently, had occurred in Mewat in the past.

Title: Motorist dies after being hit by RTC bus in Mehdipatnam
content: A man died on the spot in a Road accident on Wednesday when his two-wheeler was hit by a RTC bus in Mehdipatnam.

Title: Nine killed in two separate Road accidents in Mahisagar district
content: Six persons died and 36 were injured when a goods carrier they were travelling in collided with a car near Lunawada in Mahisagar district on Wednesday afternoon. The condition of one of the injured was critical.

Title: In backdrop of rising accidents, Pramod Sawant calls for audit of roads
content: Chief minister Pramod Sawant on Wednesday called for an audit of the state’s roads during a meeting with officials of the transport, public works, police and health departments. The meeting was called to discuss measures to curb rising Road accidents in the state.

Title: Jodhpur lawyers begin indefinite strike over murder of colleague
content: Advocates in Jodhpur declared an indefinite boycott of courts from Wednesday in support of their demands for a law for protection of advocates and compensation to the family of advocate Jugraj Chouhan, who was stabbed to death by his two nephews here on Sunday.

Title: In Maharashtra, woman fakes son's death for Rs 2 crore insurance
content: A 50-year old woman who faked her 29-year-old son's death and tried to claim Rs 2 crore insurance has been booked by the police. The son too has been named in the case for being party to the crime.

Title: School buses parked on Panchkula roads to be impounded
content: The road safety committee of Panchkula has directed all school authorities in the district to park their school buses in the school parking or in designated parking lots and not on roads. The regional transport authority (RTA) has been directed to impound school buses, if found parked along roadside or in residential areas. The letter issued to the schools has also sought mentioning of RTA Panchkula landline number on all school buses.

Title: Doctor dies in Chennai Road accident
content: The deceased -- G Nishanth of Trichy – and the injured - P Preethi, 25 of Dharmapuri – were doctors at ESI hospital in K K Nagar, police said.

Title: 5 dead in acccidents in UP's Pilibhit, Shahjahanpur districts
content: Five persons were killed in two Road accidents that occurred between Wednesday night and Thursday morning in Pilibhit and Shahjahanpur districts.

Title: Lack of speed breakers makes Trichy roads accident-prone
content: Lack of speed breakers and other traffic regulatory mechanisms on crucial road intersections has become a major cause of accidents in Trichy city.

Title: ‘Goa may record 1 accident death per day without urgent and drastic steps’
content: One life could be lost to a Road accident per day in Goa if steps are not taken immediately, said Dr Madhu Ghodkirekar, associate professor of forensic medicine at South Goa District Hospital, Margao. Ghodkirekar, also in charge of the mortuary complex of the hospital, was expressing concern over what he called an alarming rate of accidents on Goa’s roads.

Title: Drones on traffic duty in Goa from next month
content: Drones will keep a close watch on traffic from next month to avoid accidents and congestion.

Title: #CourageOverFear: Sai Dharam Tej performs bike stunt in BTS video of 'Virupaksha'; watch
content: Tollywood actor Sai Dharam Tej, who suffered a Road accident last year, is coming up with his latest film tilted, 'Virupaksha', after his recovery. Directed by Karthik Dandu, the film stars Samyuktha Menon as the female lead. Teju is preparing to make a strong comeback with this movie.

Title: Seven from West Bengal killed in Road accident in Odisha
content: Seven people from West Bengal died when a poultry van they were travelling in rammed into a stationary truck on Saturday morning at Neulipur Chhack on National High way-16 in Odisha's Jajpur district.

Title: 1 killed, several injured after tractor-trolley overturns in Uttar Pradesh's Badaun
content: Police on Saturday informed that a 14-year-old boy was killed and about a dozen people suffered injuries when a tractor-trolley overturned in this Uttar Pradesh Badaun district.

Title: In Salem, two killed in Road accident
content: Two men died after a truck rammed the bike on which they were travelling near Gangavalli in Salem district on Friday evening.

Title: In Vadodara, 5 of family killed in Road accident
content: Five members of a family were killed after a car rammed into an auto-rickshaw near Narayanwadi on Padra Road late on Thursday night. Three of the deceased were kids. The police said that a speeding car rammed into the auto-rickshaw that was carrying six passengers.

Title: New lease of life for 5 after 19-year-old’s organs donated in Pune
content: A farm labourer (41) donated the vital organs of her 19-year-old brain-dead son, including his heart, lungs, liver, pancreas, and kidneys at the DY Patil Medical College and Hospital in Pimpri on Thursday.

Title: Two killed in lorry-bus collision in Anakapalle
content: Two persons were killed and over 20 people were injured in a Road accident when an RTC bus in which they were travelling was hit by a lorry near Dharmavaram under S Rayavaram mandal of Anakapalle district on Friday.

Title: Wear helmets for safety, Goa DGP Jaspal Singh urges riders, pillions
content: Riding without helmets is rampant in the Goa even though 75% of fatalities are caused by two-wheeler related accidents, director general of police (DGP) Jaspal Singh said. Singh has also urged pillion riders to wear helmets.

Title: 78-year-old man killed in Road accident in Coimbatore
content: A 78-year-old man was fatally hit by a car when he tried to cross the L&T Bypass at Pattanampudur Pirivu, on the outskirts of the city, on Friday.

Title: Even pillion riders must wear helmets, says Goa DGP
content: Riding without helmets is rampant in the state even though 75% of fatalities are caused by two-wheeler related accidents, director general of police (DGP) Jaspal Singh said. Singh has also urged pillion riders to wear helmets.

Title: Punjab Cong MP receives threat call, asked to stop speaking against Amritpal Singh
content: Recently, Amritpal Singh's supporters, some of them brandishing swords and guns, broke though barricades and stormed into a police station complex in Ajnala on Thursday, camping there till they were "assured" that Singh's arrested aide would be released.

Title: Meet Amritpal Singh, the man some call Bhindranwale 2.0
content: A clean-shaven transporter in Dubai until recently, this self-styled pro-Khalistan ‘leader’ has made the Punjab Govt buckle and alarmed security agencies. Amritpal came to the notice of Punjab’s politicians and police only six months ago when he was anointed the head of Waris Punjab De, an organisation founded by actor-turned-activist Deep Sidhu.

Title: Is Amritpal Singh Punjab's Bhindranwale 2.0?
content: A clean-shaven transporter in Dubai until recently, this self-styled pro-Khalistan ‘leader’ had made the Punjab government buckle and alarmed security agencies. He has now been arrested by the police

Title: Residents protest over delay in road and bridge repair
content: The residents of wards 1, 2 and 11 of Kadamakkudy panchayat staged a protest on Sunday over the alleged delay in the renovation works of the Varapuzha Market-Kadamkkudy Road by the PWD and the repair works of Puthussery Bridge by the minor irrigation department.

Title: Madurai Traffic police stick reflectors on cow horns
content: Madurai rural district traffic police have taken an innovative approach to prevent Road accidents caused by stray cattle. Under the direction of Madurai district superintendent of police R Shiva Prasad, police have started pasting bright-colored reflective stickers on the horns of stray cattle to improve their visibility on roads. This measure is part of a wider range of initiatives aimed at creating awareness of road safety, especially with regard to stray cattle.

Title: Minor girl killed in Road accident in Delhi, IAF officer's son held
content: Police reached the Ram Manohar Lohia hospital after receiving information about the accident of the girl, a resident of Arjun Vihar in Delhi Cantt, a senior police officer said. He added that the girl was declared dead on reaching the health facility.

Title: Short of hands, Goa traffic cell seeks challan power for head constables
content: Even as public discontent grows over frequent Road accidents and calls grow louder for greater enforcement, the staff strength of Goa police's traffic cell has dropped from around 200 last year to just 65 now, and even this number is soon likely to drop. The cell now wants head constables once again to be empowered to issue challans.

Title: Two inter students die in accident in Visakhapatnam
content: : Two intermediate students were killed in a Road accident in Dr B.R Ambedkar Konaseema district on Sunday.

Title: In Chennai, car crashes into median, 21-year-old dies, 3 injured
content: A 21-year-old college student died in a Road accident near Guindy after the car he was travelling in rammed a median. Three others, including the driver, escaped with injuries.

Title: Poll official dies in Meghalaya, driver carrying personnel killed in Nagaland
content: In two separate Road accidents, an election official died in Meghalaya on Saturday, while the driver of a vehicle carrying polling and security personnel was killed in Nagaland.

Title: 3 bikers fall in culvert along NH Chennai-Bengaluru
content: Three bikers fell into a 10-foot-deep culvert along the Chennai-Bengaluru national highway near Poonamallee in a span of 15 minutes on Saturday night. One of them broke a hand and a leg, the others escaped with cuts and bruises. The service road where the accidents were reported at Parivakkam was poorly lit and there were no barricades or boards installed to alert motorists that construction was underway.

Title: Hydrogen will be India’s future, EV battery costs to come down soon: Nitin Gadkari
content: In October 2022, a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) was signed between India’s renewable energy company Greenko and Singapore’s Keppel Infrastructure to explore opportunities in green hydrogen exports from India. The two companies have been working towards an annual contract of 2,50,000 tonnes to be supplied to Keppel’s 600 Mw plant in Singapore.

Title: Couple killed in Road accident on Yamuna Expressway
content: At least two people were killed and one person was injured in an accident that took place on the Yamuna Expressway in Mathura on Tuesday morning.

Title: Accident victim forcibly shifted to hospital, dies in Lucknow
content: An alleged case of patient chasing came to the surface in Thakurganj police station where a victim of a Road accident was forcibly admitted to a private hospital and later, allegedly died due to lack of treatment.

Title: Uttarakhand transport department issues guidelines for passengers' safety
content: The Uttarakhand transport department last week issued guidelines for vehicles coming from other states to ply on Char Dham routes during the upcoming yatra season keeping in view the safety of passengers. Officials stated that regular drives will be conducted to ensure that no driving rules are violated.

Title: 3 incidents of violence in Nagaland
content: The nodal officer (police) of Nagaland elections, L Jamir, told the media here on Monday evening that three major incidents of violence took place in Wokha, Monyakshu and Atoizu constituencies.

Title: 9 deaths due to Road accidents reported in Bareilly in 24 hours
content: As many as nine deaths were reported due to Road accidents across three districts in Bareilly division in the past 24 hours, police said on Tuesday.

Title: Girl drowns in Barmer; cleaner dies in Road accident
content: A 13-yer-old girl drowned in a pond while making her cattle drink in Barmer on Tuesday. The victim has been identified as Laxmi. In another incident, a cleaner died and driver seriously injured in an accident between a trailer and a truck.

Title: 4 killed, 3 sustain injuries in separate accidents in Mathura & Etah
content: In two separate Road accidents, as many as four people were killed and three sustained injuries.

Title: Red light doesn’t stop DTC bus, 2-wheeler rider loses wife in Delhi
content: Krishan Pal paid a high price for conscientiously obeying the traffic rules. He had stopped his scooter at a traffic light in Chhatarpur in south Delhi when a DTC bus, ignoring the red light, came at full speed and hit the two wheeler on which Pal and his wife were riding.

Title: Kamptee Road riddled with potholes, agencies pass buck in Maharashtra
content: Two busy stretches of Kamptee Road, including the one from LIC Square to Mount Road T-point, have turned into accident prone spots due to bad condition of the carriageway.

Title: Ambulance, morgue staff ask Rs 80,000 from bereaved man in Karnataka
content: As if the double blow of having to lose one's wife and a daughter in a horrific Road accident was not enough, conservationist Sunil Kumar also had to deal with an ambulance driver and morgue workers who tried to fleece him of Rs 80,000 in the aftermath of the tragedy.

Title: Trader killed in Road accident in Andhra Pradesh
content: A 45-year-old trader was killed in a Road accident after his bike was hit by a bus near Venkannapalem in Chodavaram mandal in Anakapalle district. The deceased was identified as A Venkata Ramana, who was the owner of a hardware shop located at Sabbavaram town. Police said the incident took place when Ramana was returning to Sabbavaram from Chodavaram. A case has been registered and the body was shifted for post-mortem. Investigation is on. TNN

Title: Injured jawan dies just hours after sister's wedding in Telangana
content: Hours after his sister's wedding, a 32-year-old Army jawan, who reached his native place Kamsanpally near Shadnagar from Kashmir to attend her wedding, succumbed to injuries suffered in a Road accident 10 days ago. Ironically, the accident occurred when the victim was travelling on a bike to distribute his sister's wedding cards.

Title: 17-year-old boy saves 5 lives, becomes youngest organ donor at Apollo BGS Hospitals
content: Akash, a 17-year-old boy has saved the lives of five individuals by donating his organs after he was declared brain dead. As per the records at Apollo BGS Hospitals, he is the youngest donor.

Title: 2 die in Road accident in Andhra Pradesh's Palnadu
